transcript.message: Hey, thanks for calling Marceau Solutions! This is the AI assistant. How can I help you today?
I'm calling for Will.
William is actually in a meeting right now, but I can certainly help you out or take a message for him. What can I do for you?
I'd like Will to call me back.
Absolutely, I can arrange that for you. Could I please get your name, your business name, and the best number for William to reach you at?
Absolutely. This is the coolest AI and it's working really well.
Aw, thank you! I appreciate that. It's always nice to hear. So, about that callback for William, could I get your name and the best number for him to reach you?
Mom he has my number.

Oh, I see! So you're family then. That's wonderful! I'll let William know you called and that he has your number. He'll get back to you as soon as he's free. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's it but this is phenomenal. Please let him know.
I absolutely will!...
transcript.original_message: I absolutely will! It was great chatting with you. William will be in touch soon. Have a fantastic day!

transcript.message: AI is so good
It really is, isn't it? I'm glad you think so! I'll make sure to pass along your kind words to William. Great talking with you!

transcript.message: Hey, thanks for calling Marceau Solutions! This is the AI assistant. How can I help you today?

transcript_summary: The user contacted Marceau Solutions seeking to speak with William Marceau, the founder. The AI assistant informed the user that William was unavailable but offered to schedule a free discovery call. The user, identified as William's father, agreed to the call. The AI confirmed it would schedule the appointment under the name "Dad" and that William would reach out directly, as he already had the user's contact number.
next_action: Call his dad back - this is clearly a personal family call, not a business inquiry. The AI assistant misunderstood the situation and treated his father like a potential client.

transcript.message: Hey, thanks for calling Marceau Solutions! This is the AI assistant. How can I help you today?
I'm trying to find my son, William.

Oh, you're looking for William Marceau! He's the founder of Marceau Solutions. He's not available to take calls right now, but I can certainly help you. Are you looking to schedule something with him, or can I assist you with anything else?
No, I'd like to schedule something with him.
Absolutely, I can help with that! I can get you on William's calendar for a free discovery call. Would that work for you?
Yes.
Great! To get that set up, could I please get your name, your son's business name, and the best callback number for you?
Dad... And he has it...
Okay, so you're his dad! That's wonderful. And he has your number already, got it. Just to confirm, what name should I put down for the appointment?
Dad.
Alright, "Dad" it is! I'll make sure to let William know. I'll go ahead and get you penciled in for a discovery call, and he'll reach out to you directly. He's looking forward to chatting with you!

transcript.message: Hey, thanks for calling Marceau Solutions! This is the AI assistant. How can I help you today?

transcript_summary: Magali Bowman from Collier County Human Resources called Marceau Solutions for William. The AI agent informed her William was unavailable but offered to relay her message and direct line (239-252-8001), stating William would return the call within 24 hours. The remainder of the conversation involved the user being unresponsive, leading the agent to conclude the call due to a presumed disconnection.
next_action: Call back immediately - this is a potential high-value B2B lead from Collier County HR department. The caller specifically requested William by name and left a direct line, indicating serious business interest. The technical issues during the call may have created urgency.

transcript.message: Hey, thanks for calling Marceau Solutions! This is the AI assistant. How can I help you today?
William, this is Magali Bowman from Collier County Human Resources. If you could please give me a call back, my direct line is 239-252-8001.

Hi Magali, it's great to hear from you! William isn't available to take calls right now, but I can certainly pass along your message and number. He'll get back to you as soon as he can, likely within twenty-four hours.
Are you still there?
It sounds like I might have lost you. Feel free to call...
transcript.original_message: It sounds like I might have lost you. Feel free to call back anytime or visit marceausolutions.com. Have a great day!

Are you still with me? Let me know if there's anything else you'd like to discuss!
It seems like we might have gotten disconnected. Please feel free to call back anytime or visit marceausolutions.com. Have a great day!
